---
title: Grove - CAN Bus Module
description: A CAN communication module for Arduino-compatible boards.
---

# Grove - CAN Bus Module

## Hardware Overview

- Main IC: MCP2515
- Interface: SPI
- Connector: Grove 4-pin

## Features

- CAN 2.0B support
- Frequency: 16MHz

## Applications

- Vehicle network experiments

## Pin Definition

| Pin | Function |
| --- | --- |
| MOSI | SPI data out |
| MISO | SPI data in |
| SCK | SPI clock |

## Documents

- [Datasheet](https://files.seeedstudio.com/mcp2515.pdf)
